statusLine.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); DIRTY=''; [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && DIRTY='*'; echo "$BRANCH$DIRTY"

hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.filePath' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '(docs/|\.claude/|\.github/|\.gitignore|package\.json|CLAUDE\.md)' || echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(md|json|yml|yaml)$'; then exit 0; fi; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|astro)$'; then PROJ_DIR=$(echo "$FILE" | sed 's|/pipeline/.*||; s|/blog/.*||'); if [ ! -f "$PROJ_DIR/.claude/.current-issue" ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: No approved GH issue. Follow workflow: Plan → Blueprint → GH Issue → Execute. Create the plan first."}'; exit 0; fi; fi; exit 0
CMD="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_COMMAND"; if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git push'; then echo '[Hook] About to push to remote. Make sure changes are reviewed.' >&2; fi; exit 0

FILE="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then LOGS=$(grep -n 'console\.log' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null | head -5); if [ -n "$LOGS" ]; then echo "[Hook] console.log detected in $FILE:" >&2; echo "$LOGS" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0

echo '--- Type Check ---' >&2; cd pipeline && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty 2>&1 | tail -5 || true; echo '--- Console.log Scan ---' >&2; DIRTY=$(git diff --name-only --diff-filter=M 2>/dev/null | grep -E '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'); if [ -n "$DIRTY" ]; then FOUND=$(echo "$DIRTY" | xargs grep -ln 'console\.log' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$FOUND" ]; then echo '[Hook] console.log found in modified files:' >&2; echo "$FOUND" >&2; fi; fi; exit 0
